title: Saudi Arabian Biryani
description: A flavorful and aromatic Saudi biryani dish made with saudi arabian spices, grape tomatoes, and crowd pleaser ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the grape tomatoes and sauté until they start to soften.
Add the Basmati rice and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add 2 cups of water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
Fluff the rice with a fork and serve hot.
